category_sources: source_facts.description: SDK for building Kubernetes APIs using CRDs; official Kubebuilder Book documents building Kubernetes APIs.
display_name_sources: Official documentation is titled The Kubebuilder Book; source_facts.name is kubebuilder.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation is The Kubebuilder Book at book.kubebuilder.io; official repository README is secondary.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/kubebuilder, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes APIs and CRDs; Kubebuilder documentation covers API/operator project development.
